fixture_notice: The positive cross-domain values are an explicitly labelled acceptance fixture, not real accounting or delivery data.

cases.evidence: Five consecutive authenticated browser runs returned one byte-identical canonical project with budget variance 18,500 CZK, critical-milestone delay 447 days and three governed contract citations.

The exact stratos_admin ProjectFlow application grant was temporarily deactivated; the request failed closed as Nedostatecny Zdroj in 537 ms and returned no domain facts. The same grant was restored exactly and the positive flow passed again.
director-copilot-chat.test.ts revalidates the authoritative STRATOS projection immediately before synthesis, returns ACCESS_PROJECTION_CHANGED_BEFORE_SYNTHESIS and does not call RAG.
director-copilot-access.test.ts fails closed for expired application access and inactive identity; pre-synthesis refresh bypasses the projection cache.
director-copilot-orchestrator.test.ts rejects a governed citation whose policy summary hash does not match and exposes no document finding.
director-copilot-chat.test.ts blocks RESTRICTED and NO_EXTERNAL_AI evidence before model synthesis and records no protected content in the response.
director-copilot-orchestrator.test.ts preserves a marked partial Budget snapshot when ProjectFlow returns a 503, with unavailable source metadata and no invented delivery facts.
The STRATOS ProjectFlow domain-tool contract returns only the closed fact catalogue and canonical identifier; its response contains no prompt or project-name text.
director-copilot-contracts.test.ts rejects source responses that expand requested scope; ProjectFlow separately requires active local project membership after central scope authorization.
director-copilot-orchestrator.test.ts returns no_match and no snapshot when complete Budget and ProjectFlow sources have no shared canonical project.
